title: No Such Thing As Billions Of Checkers Boards
content:
Daniel Sloss joins Dan, James and Andy to discuss Lord of the Rings, North of the Border, and the Father of Electricity.

Visit nosuchthingasafish.com for news about live shows, merchandise, and more episodes.
